column2: mutate(PD_access = case_when(grepl("^Yes", PDFunds) ~ 1L, PDFunds == "No" ~ 0L, TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
pd_summary <- dat %>% count(PDFunds) %>% mutate(Percentage = round(100 * n / sum(n), 1)) %>% arrange(desc(n))
pd_summary %>% kable(caption = "Professional Development Funding") %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
